---
description: "Review implemented code against task acceptance criteria, AGENTS.md standards, and test coverage. Use after a task is implemented and before marking it complete."
agent: lead
---

Review the implementation of task **${input:task}** from `specs/tasks/` using `/code-review-skill`. The task argument may be the path-style ID `FNNN/NNN` (e.g., `F001/003`) or the full path/filename.
